positioning.tagline: I run 150 offices. I also do your mortgage. And I'll walk you through every new build in town.
positioning.uniqueAngle: Nobody else in Santa Clarita combines executive suite management (200+ tenants), mortgage lending, AND new construction access. That triple lens gives Chance credibility no single-role agent or LO can match.
positioning.audiencePrimary: First-time homebuyers in Santa Clarita / LA County (25-40, dual income, browsing Zillow at night)
positioning.audienceSecondary: Move-up buyers considering new construction, real estate agents who need a reliable lender, 360 Suites tenants considering buying
competitiveEdge: Business operator credibility (GM of 150+ offices = understands money, not just loans)
New construction insider access (walks the actual sites, knows builder promos before public)
Local authority (lives, works, manages property IN Santa Clarita)
Dual revenue = no pressure (doesn't need to hard-sell loans because he has W-2 stability)

contentPillars.name: New Construction Insider
contentPillars.description: Walk new construction sites. Show floorplans, upgrades, builder promos, what's available. Be the guy who shows people homes before they hit the market.
exampleHooks: This builder is offering $40K in incentives right now and nobody's talking about it
I just walked a $550K new build in Santa Clarita. Let me show you what you get
New construction vs resale — here's what $600K looks like side by side
POV: You're touring a brand new home that's not on Zillow yet
3 things the builder won't tell you about this community (but I will)

contentPillars.name: Mortgage Made Simple
contentPillars.description: Break down mortgage concepts in plain English. DPA programs, rate strategies, qualification tips. Position as the LO who explains, not sells.
exampleHooks: You can buy a home in California with $0 down. Here's how
Stop Googling mortgage rates. Here's what actually determines YOUR rate
The $15K grant nobody talks about for first-time buyers in CA
Your landlord's mortgage is cheaper than your rent. Let me show you the math
3 things that kill your mortgage approval (and 2 that don't matter)

contentPillars.name: The Operator
contentPillars.description: Behind the scenes of running 360 Executive Suites. Business operations, leadership moments, day-in-the-life. Shows credibility and relatability.
exampleHooks: I manage 150 offices before I start my mortgage day. Here's what that looks like
Running a business taught me more about money than any finance degree
POV: You're the GM of 4 commercial buildings at 29
What managing 200 tenants taught me about people (and real estate)
A day in my life managing executive suites + closing mortgage deals

contentPillars.name: Santa Clarita Local
contentPillars.description: Neighborhood spotlights, market data, local business features, community events. Own the local search.
exampleHooks: Thinking about moving to Santa Clarita? Here's what $600K gets you
The 3 best neighborhoods in SCV for families right now
Santa Clarita housing market update — here's what's actually happening
I live and work here. Here's why Santa Clarita is underrated
New development alert: [Builder] just broke ground in [Area]

filmingBrief: 2x Mortgage Made Simple (talking head — hook + 60 sec tip)
1x The Operator (behind the scenes or day-in-life clip)
1x Santa Clarita Local (market update or neighborhood feature)

thursday.note: New construction walkthrough content day — film at site if available

friday.batchLocation: New construction site OR garage studio
filmingBrief: 2x New Construction Insider (walkthrough + talking head at site)
1x Car content (quick take, reaction, or market thought)

saturday.note: All pre-scheduled from batch sessions. Day off from filming.

sunday.note: Light day. One post pre-scheduled. Rest.

step1_film.where: 360 Suites studio, new construction sites, garage, car
step1_film.output: 8-10 raw clips per week uploaded to Google Drive folder

step2_upload.what: Drop raw clips into Google Drive 'Content Machine' folder

step3_edit.what: CapCut Pro auto-edit: trim, captions, transitions, format for vertical
step3_edit.how: CapCut batch import → auto-caption → trending template → export all sizes
step3_edit.automation: CapCut AI handles 90% — just review and export

step4_script.what: Claude generates captions, hashtags, and posting copy for each clip
step4_script.how: Claude reads content-machine.json calendar, generates platform-specific copy
step4_script.automation: 100% automated via Claude session or scheduled agent

step5_schedule.what: Upload edited clips to Metricool, schedule across all 7 platforms
step5_schedule.how: Metricool bulk upload → drag to calendar slots → auto-post

step6_engage.what: Reply to comments, DMs, engage with target accounts
step6_engage.how: Phone — respond to comments, answer DMs, engage with builder/realtor posts

analyticsAudit.frequency: Weekly (Sunday evening via Sunday Reset agent) + Monthly deep dive
monthlyDeepDive: Content pillar performance ranking (views, engagement, leads)
Format performance ranking (walkthrough vs talking head vs comparison etc)
Hook analysis — which opening lines drove highest retention
Competitor benchmark — compare growth rate to tracked creators
Lead attribution — any deals or inquiries traceable to content
Posting time optimization — best days and times from data
Content gaps — what topics got asked about but not covered
Next month adjustments — shift pillar weights based on performance

auditProcess.step1: Export analytics from each platform (or use Metricool unified dashboard)
auditProcess.step2: Paste or upload data into Claude session
auditProcess.step3: Claude analyzes against content-machine.json targets and prior weeks
auditProcess.step4: Claude outputs: what worked, what didn't, specific adjustments for next week
auditProcess.step5: Claude updates content-machine.json with new pillar weights, format preferences, and hook patterns
auditProcess.step6: Next week's content calendar auto-adjusts based on learnings

month2.goal: Find winning format. Double down on top pillar.

month3.goal: First content-sourced deal. Viral breakout attempt.

patternsFromTopCreators.example: Everyone says you need 20% down. They're lying.
POV: You're touring a $500K new build that's not on Zillow
Your rent is $2,400. A mortgage on the same house? $2,100.
This builder is running a promo they don't advertise
If you're renting in Santa Clarita, watch this
What $550K looked like 2 years ago vs today
3 new construction communities in SCV you need to know about
I filed bankruptcy and still built a mortgage business. Here's how.
A builder just offered THIS to buyers and I had to share it
Let me walk you through the best value new build in Santa Clarita right now

chanceSpecificHooks: I manage 150 offices and do mortgages. Here's why that matters for YOUR home purchase.
I just toured [Builder]'s newest community. Here's what nobody else will tell you.
I went through bankruptcy and now I help people buy homes. Real talk.
New construction in Santa Clarita just dropped. Let me show you inside.
Most loan officers read about real estate. I live in it every day — here's the difference.
Stop scrolling Zillow. This new build isn't on there yet but it should be.
The builder is paying $40K toward your closing costs right now. Here's the catch.
I manage 200 tenants. Half of them should be homeowners. Here's why.
Your Realtor won't show you this because it's not on MLS.
New construction vs resale in Santa Clarita — I'll show you both.

competitorTracker.strength: Makes complex math simple, high volume
Teaches agents how to create content
System for growing on social — study their framework
Dual character skits make education entertaining
Local CA angle — direct competitor positioning

compliance.required: NMLS# 2529600 in bio on all platforms. DRE# 02245979 where applicable.
rules: Never quote specific rates in content
Never promise loan approval or specific terms
DPA program mentions require disclaimer: 'Subject to eligibility. Contact me for details.'
Client stories require written consent before posting
Builder incentive mentions: 'Promotions subject to change. Verify directly with builder.'
RESPA: No quid pro quo with referral partners on camera
